message:
perf: hybrid WebGPU + WASM SIMD for vector search

Process vectors in chunks that fit within WebGPU buffer limit:
- Use getMaxVectorsPerBatch() to calculate optimal chunk size
- Process each chunk with WebGPU (up to 128MB buffer limit)
- Fall back to WASM SIMD for chunks that fail
- Log breakdown: "X WebGPU, Y WASM SIMD"

This maximizes GPU utilization while gracefully handling
datasets larger than WebGPU buffer limits.
